official_nationality_route.value: Luxembourg naturalisation requires both language proof and a Vivre ensemble certificate, and the official citizenship route consists of the INLL Sproochentest plus the Vivre ensemble course or test.

official_exam_and_credential.value: The Sproochentest is run by INLL, assessed at A2 speaking and B1 listening, and INLL treats it as the only recognised certification for nationality applications.

official_integration_route.value: Luxembourg already has an official 24-hour Vivre ensemble course or exam route covering civic rights, institutions, history, and European integration, with online courses offered in English.

conditional_reimbursement_route.value: Guichet fixes the Sproochentest fee at EUR 75 and confirms a conditional reimbursement route for Sproochentest and approved-course fees only after the nationality application is filed.

official_approval_route.value: For the 20-year residence route, only SFA-run or ministerially accredited Article 28 courses qualify, and validated course certificates receive an official seal.

value: The legacy reimbursement line is too compressed; only the EUR 75 test fee and a conditional reimbursement route are cleanly supported
No public proof was found that A9 itself is an approved or reimbursable Article 28 course
No public proof was found that any A9-issued certificate has official value in the nationality process
The uniqueness or pure-upsell claim is contradicted by public and private alternatives
The HR-onboarding buyer route remains unverified in external evidence

target_audience_summary.value: Nationality candidates are the clearest verified audience; HR onboarding remains a plausible but unverified secondary use case.
target_audience_summary.omission_reason: The nationality route is evidenced, but the employer-buyer layer is still inferential.

pricing_context.value: Observed public alternatives range from a free online tier to 745-980 EUR paid preparation offers, but the scopes are too mixed for a safe dashboard price anchor.
pricing_context.omission_reason: Useful analyst context only; the offers are not close enough in scope to anchor a safe price claim for A9.

product_bundle_scope.omission_reason: The rerun verified the surrounding route context, not the exact boundary of A9 itself.

product_support_route_eligibility.omission_reason: Official route conditions are known, but no A9-specific approval or reimbursement proof was found.

product_certificate_official_value.omission_reason: Official standing was verified for INLL and validated Article 28 certificates, not for any A9-issued deliverable.

reimbursement_cap_dashboard_copy.omission_reason: The official route survives, but the clean primary-source 750-euro cap message did not.

hr_onboarding_demand.omission_reason: No external demand or buyer-route evidence was verified for the HR positioning.

unique_market_gap_claim.omission_reason: The whitespace claim is contradicted by verified public and private alternatives.
